title: Esports DB
description: PandaScore esports data — matches, teams, players, tournaments, leagues.

game_overview.title: Game Coverage Overview
game_overview.description: How many leagues, series and tournaments does each game have? A quick snapshot of coverage across all titles.
game_overview.sql: SELECT v.name AS game, v.slug, COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) AS leagues, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS series, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS tournaments FROM videogames v LEFT JOIN leagues l ON l.videogame_id = v.id LEFT JOIN series s ON s.videogame_id = v.id LEFT JOIN tournaments t ON t.videogame_id = v.id GROUP BY v.id ORDER BY leagues DESC

leagues_by_game.title: Leagues for a Game
leagues_by_game.description: Browse every league for a specific title. Try: Counter-Strike, Valorant, Dota 2, LoL, Overwatch, Rocket League, PUBG.
leagues_by_game.sql: SELECT l.name AS league, l.slug, l.url, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS series_count FROM leagues l JOIN videogames v ON v.id = l.videogame_id LEFT JOIN series s ON s.league_id = l.id WHERE v.name LIKE '%' || :game || '%' GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY series_count DESC

top_leagues_by_activity.title: Most Active Leagues
top_leagues_by_activity.description: Which leagues have the most series? A ranking of the busiest competitive circuits across all games.
top_leagues_by_activity.sql: SELECT l.name AS league, v.name AS game, COUNT(s.id) AS series_count FROM leagues l JOIN videogames v ON v.id = l.videogame_id JOIN series s ON s.league_id = l.id GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY series_count DESC LIMIT 25

premier_tournaments.title: Premier (S-Tier) Tournaments
premier_tournaments.description: The most prestigious events in esports — S-tier tournaments only. These are the Majors, Worlds, and Grand Finals.
premier_tournaments.sql: SELECT t.name, t.full_name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.begin_at, t.end_at, t.prizepool FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN series s ON s.id = t.serie_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.tier = 's' ORDER BY t.begin_at DESC

tournaments_with_prize_pools.title: Tournaments with Prize Pools
tournaments_with_prize_pools.description: Events that had prize money on the line. Shows the purse alongside the game and league context.
tournaments_with_prize_pools.sql: SELECT t.name, t.full_name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.prizepool, t.tier, t.begin_at, t.end_at FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.prizepool IS NOT NULL AND t.prizepool != '' ORDER BY t.begin_at DESC

series_by_year.title: Competitive Seasons by Year
series_by_year.description: All series (competitive seasons) for a given year. Shows which leagues were active and in which games.
series_by_year.sql: SELECT s.full_name AS series, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, s.season, s.begin_at, s.end_at FROM series s JOIN videogames v ON v.id = s.videogame_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = s.league_id WHERE s.year = cast(:year as integer) ORDER BY v.name, l.name, s.begin_at

league_history.title: League Season History
league_history.description: All series and tournaments ever run under a specific league. Enter a league name (or part of it) to trace its full history.
league_history.sql: SELECT s.year, s.full_name AS series, s.season, s.begin_at, s.end_at, COUNT(t.id) AS tournaments FROM series s JOIN leagues l ON l.id = s.league_id LEFT JOIN tournaments t ON t.serie_id = s.id WHERE l.name LIKE '%' || :league || '%' GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.year DESC, s.begin_at DESC

tournament_tier_breakdown.title: Tournament Tiers by Game
tournament_tier_breakdown.description: How many S/A/B/C/D-tier events exist per game? Tiers reflect prestige: S = premier, A = top, B = mid, C/D = regional/open.
tournament_tier_breakdown.sql: SELECT v.name AS game, t.tier, COUNT(*) AS tournament_count FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id WHERE t.tier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY v.id, t.tier ORDER BY v.name, CASE t.tier WHEN 's' THEN 1 WHEN 'a' THEN 2 WHEN 'b' THEN 3 WHEN 'c' THEN 4 WHEN 'd' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

search_leagues.title: Search Leagues
search_leagues.description: Find a league by name — useful for looking up circuits like ESL, IEM, VCT, DreamLeague, PGL, BLAST, etc.
search_leagues.sql: SELECT l.name AS league, v.name AS game, l.slug, l.url, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS series_count FROM leagues l JOIN videogames v ON v.id = l.videogame_id LEFT JOIN series s ON s.league_id = l.id WHERE l.name LIKE '%' || :search || '%' GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY series_count DESC

recent_tournaments.title: Most Recent Tournaments
recent_tournaments.description: The latest completed tournaments across all games, sorted by end date.
recent_tournaments.sql: SELECT t.name, t.full_name, v.name AS game, l.name AS league, t.tier, t.prizepool, t.begin_at, t.end_at FROM tournaments t JOIN videogames v ON v.id = t.videogame_id JOIN series s ON s.id = t.serie_id JOIN leagues l ON l.id = t.league_id WHERE t.end_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.end_at DESC LIMIT 50
